description: Lock the 2026-07-07 removals that keep broad POCT and early immersive VR from inheriting later implementation-specific prerequisites.

checks.reason: Lab-on-a-chip is a later microfluidic POCT implementation path, not a direct prerequisite for general near-patient testing.
The Sutherland-style immersive VR scope depends on computer graphics, software, electronics, and tracking rather than desktop GUI software.
The 1968 head-mounted display anchor requires generated three-dimensional imagery.
The node is anchored to Sutherland's 1968 head-mounted three-dimensional display for computer-simulated VR.
